source: Constructed: pkg/v0_1/mode/seal with fixed root_key=HKDF(0x01, nil, root-key, 64)
notes: recv_chain_key = chain_key from seal-root-key vector above.
remote_ratchet_pub: the sender's ratchet public key (embedded in header bytes 9-40).
ciphertext: ChaCha20-Poly1305 output (plaintext + 16-byte tag = 29 bytes = 58 hex chars).
Test: Decrypt(root_key, recv_chain_key, header, ciphertext) == plaintext.
